# <Domain> Standards

One short paragraph: what this standard governs and why it matters.

## Rules

- **Rule:** the normative statement. Keep it terse and imperative.
- **Rule:** another rule, with a concrete example where it helps.

## Examples

```text
Good: path/to/good-example
Bad:  path/to/bad-example
```

## Enforcement

How the rule is checked (validator, CI, review). Link to the relevant tooling.
